---
title: "#gwas-data"
format: gfm
---


## 2021-01-23

*10:42:38 - @Vince Carey has joined the channel*
**Vince Carey** (10:42:38):
> set the channel description: Continues a discussion of data structures for GWAS-related data, especially summary statistics

*10:43:01 - @Malte Thodberg has joined the channel*
*10:43:01 - @Kasper D. Hansen has joined the channel*
*10:43:01 - @Kevin Blighe has joined the channel*
*10:43:12 - @RGentleman has joined the channel*
*10:43:24 - @Qian Liu has joined the channel*
**Vince Carey** (10:45:46):
> [https://vjcitn.github.io/gwaslake/articles/gwaslake.html](https://vjcitn.github.io/gwaslake/articles/gwaslake.html)defines a container and starts a documentation effort to aid interested parties ... building the container with gwasglue proved problematic, and a few packages needed DESCRIPTION tweaked, and thus repos were forked.
  - Attachment (vjcitn.github.io): [gwaslake: exploring the MRC GWAS API and data/software ecosystem with Bioconductor](https://vjcitn.github.io/gwaslake/articles/gwaslake.html)
    > gwaslake

*14:54:29 - @Yagoub Ali Ibrahim Adam has joined the channel*
*14:54:43 - @Lambda Moses has joined the channel*
*14:55:40 - @Sridhar N has joined the channel*
*19:32:54 - @FelixErnst has joined the channel*
*21:38:02 - @rohitsatyam102 has joined the channel*

## 2021-01-24

**Malte Thodberg** (03:54:58):
> Looks cool!
> Pretty interesting to see that their gwasglue and ieugwas packages don’t use any Bioconductor at all…

*12:02:21 - @Ludwig Geistlinger has joined the channel*
*14:57:09 - @Frederick Tan has joined the channel*
*17:19:21 - @Hector Climente has joined the channel*

## 2021-01-25

*12:37:09 - @Sean Davis has joined the channel*

## 2021-02-08

*11:26:40 - @Rene Welch has joined the channel*

## 2021-02-23

*10:32:40 - @Wynn Cheung has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-12

*14:51:24 - @Julia Romanowska has joined the channel*

## 2021-04-21

*13:55:58 - @Aishwarya Mandava has joined the channel*

## 2021-04-29

*04:47:32 - @Tembi F has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-01

*21:42:34 - @Arjun Krishnan has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-11

*16:45:00 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-03

*17:04:10 - @Kurt Showmaker has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*11:12:49 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2022-02-01

*09:59:01 - @Lindsay Clark has joined the channel*

## 2022-05-05

*12:22:45 - @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel*

## 2022-05-10

*05:11:22 - @Daniel Adediran has joined the channel*

## 2022-10-10

*13:55:59 - @Mercilena Benjamin has joined the channel*

## 2022-10-28

*08:31:02 - @Brian Schilder has joined the channel*

## 2022-11-06

*11:20:46 - @Sherine Khalafalla Saber has joined the channel*

## 2022-12-11

**Vince Carey** (07:31:01):
> Anyone experienced with variant annotation by Nirvana?[https://illumina.github.io/NirvanaDocumentation/](https://illumina.github.io/NirvanaDocumentation/)
  - Attachment (illumina.github.io): [Introduction | Nirvana](https://illumina.github.io/NirvanaDocumentation/)
    > Clinical-grade variant annotation


## 2022-12-12

*17:58:27 - @Kendall H. Burks has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-03

*10:33:52 - @Alan Murphy has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-21

*16:02:33 - @Hien has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-26

*23:20:46 - @Hien has left the channel*

## 2023-03-10

*15:35:35 - @Joaquin Reyna has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-03

*16:16:11 - @Rebecca Butler has joined the channel*

## 2023-06-19

*05:10:47 - @Pierre-Paul Axisa has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-12

*22:19:22 - @Xiuwen Zheng has joined the channel*

## 2024-01-26

**Vince Carey** (05:44:50):
> VariantAnnotation (devel branch) now includes vep_by_region, which prepares a request to the ensembl REST API for variant effect prediction.  The perl-based API interfaces in ensemblVEP will no longer be maintained; the Bioconductor ensemblVEP package will be deprecated in 3.19.


## 2024-07-29

*17:09:32 - @JP Flores has joined the channel*

## 2024-08-27

*11:36:52 - @Bharat Mishra has joined the channel*

## 2024-09-16

*06:24:29 - @Mike Morgan has joined the channel*

## 2024-09-18

**Alan Murphy** (05:05:51):
> Hey All! I'm the creator of the[MungeSumstats](https://github.com/Al-Murphy/MungeSumstats)Bioconductor package which standardises and performs quality control of GWAS sumstats. We recently encountered an issue with mislabeled allele columns in a GWAS which I would like to get the communities opinions on? If you have 5 minutes, see this[Twitter post](https://x.com/Al_Murphy_/status/1834195362052997123)on it and the[related github issue](https://github.com/Al-Murphy/MungeSumstats/issues/193)


## 2025-03-18

*15:00:54 - @Nicolo has joined the channel*
